notes: All tests pass. Scenario 18: DistributedProvider satisfies RecipeProvider and RefreshableProvider interfaces (compile-time check in TestDistributedProvider_ImplementsInterfaces). Source() returns correct 'acme/tools' value. Get() works with cache hits, returns 'not found' for missing recipes, validates download host allowlist, and propagates rate limit errors. List() returns recipe infos with correct source annotation, handles empty lists. Refresh() bypasses cache freshness and updates source meta via API. go vet and go build both exit 0. Scenario 19: splitQualifiedName correctly parses 'owner/repo:recipe' format across 9 sub-cases (valid qualified, bare names, edge cases). Loader routes qualified names to the matching DistributedProvider, bare names to central. Qualified and bare names with the same recipe name use distinct cache keys (no collision). Missing provider for a qualifier returns a clear error. GetWithSource works for qualified distributed names.
